name: @hojai/copilots
description: Copilots SDK - Client for the 7 HOJAI department copilots (agent, business, executive, finance, marketing, sales, support). One sub-client per copilot, ~50 methods total.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc src/__tests__/index.test.ts --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --declaration --outDir dist

author: HOJAI AI
